# MEOK AI Labs — EU AI Act Compliance

> MEOK AI Labs ships open-source MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that automate AI governance and compliance. The flagship offering is a toolkit for EU AI Act conformity — deadline 2 August 2026, penalties up to €35M or 7% of global turnover.

## What we do
MEOK AI Labs produces the only ISO 42001 MCP server stack in existence: 211+ MCP servers published on PyPI that audit AI systems against 13 regulatory frameworks (EU AI Act, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, GDPR, HIPAA, SOC 2, and more). Built by Nicholas Templeman.

## Who we serve
- GRC / AI Governance teams at EU-exposed companies
- AI product builders needing pre-August-2026 readiness
- Consultancies doing AI Act conformity assessments

## Products
- **48-hour compliance assessment** — £5,000 written report: https://buy.stripe.com/4gM7sN2G0bIKeQJfL28k833
- **Monthly compliance tooling** — £499/mo enterprise tier: https://buy.stripe.com/28EcN7fsM002fUN1Uc8k835
- **£199 self-serve toolkit**: https://buy.stripe.com/6oUfZja8s002cIB56o8k831
- **211 free open-source MCPs**: `pip install eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp` (and 210 others) — https://pypi.org/user/MEOK_AI_Labs/

## Key facts
- EU AI Act enforcement begins 2 August 2026
- Penalties: up to €35 million or 7% of global annual turnover
- High-risk AI systems (Annex III) include: hiring, credit scoring, medical diagnostics, education access, law enforcement
- Required controls under Articles 9–15: risk management, data governance, technical documentation, record keeping, transparency, human oversight, accuracy/robustness

## Who runs it
Nicholas Templeman — solo founder, UK-based, 100% ownership. Operating independently. Focus areas: AI governance, open-source humanoid robotics (Asimov project), care-aligned AI.

- Website: https://meok.ai

## Source citations
- EU AI Act text: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689
- Official EU AI Act Compliance Checker: https://ai-act-service-desk.ec.europa.eu/en/eu-ai-act-compliance-checker
- ISO 42001:2023 — AI Management System Standard
